summary:
Iteration 5 verification: upsert-based idempotent seed, startup deduplicate_accounts, updated platform icon colors (YT #CC0000, IG #F77737, TT #00A8B5), tagline line break via
, emergentintegrations removed. Backend: 25/25 pytest pass. Frontend: all 12 interaction + visual checks pass via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 347: `sentiment = detect_sentiment(rc['comment_text'])` — detect_sentiment is async (see services/groq_service.py, confirmed by tests). Call must be awaited; currently assigns a coroutine object to sentiment. Not exercised in demo-seed path so tests pass, but will break real /comments/fetch runs. Recommend: `sentiment = await detect_sentiment(...)`.

server.py startup dedup keeps an arbitrary 'first' doc via group order — fine for demo data but non-deterministic across restarts if real duplicates ever appear; consider sorting by created_at before keeping first.
seed-demo response still returns {"seeded": true} regardless of whether rows were inserted — misleading for callers. Consider returning actual upserted counts via update_one.upserted_id inspection.
seed_data_creation: Seed endpoint called 3x with upsert — account count stayed at 4 across multiple calls. No duplicates in /api/platforms or /api/accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 review-request items verified end-to-end. Backend: POST /api/seed-demo is idempotent via $setOnInsert upsert on account.id and (platform_comment_id+account_id). Calling 3x keeps exactly 4 accounts. Startup deduplicate_accounts fires on every supervisor restart (confirmed via backend.err.log 'Startup: duplicate accounts cleaned'). emergentintegrations confirmed absent from requirements.txt. Frontend: tagline renders on 2 lines ('YOUR COMMENT INBOX,' / 'POWERED BY AI'), sidebar + card icon colors verified pixel-exact (YT rgb(204,0,0), IG rgb(247,119,55), FB rgb(24,119,242), TT rgb(0,168,181)). Each platform shows count=1 in sidebar. All CRUD interactions still work: approve (4→3), skip (3→2), toggle-like flips, edit opens/cancels, tone dropdown persists 'Casual', account filter + show-all navigate correctly. Added 2 new tests (test_seed_idempotent rewritten + test_platforms_no_duplicate_accounts).
verified_features: GET /api/platforms returns exactly 1 account per platform
Startup deduplicate_accounts logs 'Startup: duplicate accounts cleaned' on every boot
All CRUD endpoints (approve, skip, edit, regenerate, toggle-like, tone) return 200 and persist
Sidebar platform icons: YT #CC0000, IG #F77737, FB #1877F2, TT #00A8B5
CommentCard platform icons use same updated palette
